# Issue #3: Simplify Timer Implementation

## Objective
Redesign the timer to be minimally visible and only appear when needed, with simplified controls.

## Requirements
1. Timer only visible when audio is playing
2. Simple slider with 0-8 hour range
3. Minimal time display when timer active
4. Remove dropdown/complex timer UI
5. Simplified timer state management

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Timer UI only appears during playback
- [ ] Timer slider uses minimal design
- [ ] Timer display shows remaining time clearly
- [ ] Timer state persists correctly
- [ ] Timer triggers stop correctly
- [ ] No unnecessary UI elements
- [ ] Smooth transitions between states

## Dependencies
- Issue #1 (Grid Layout) should be completed first for proper layout integration

## Testing Guidelines
1. Test timer at various intervals
2. Verify timer persistence across app restart
3. Check timer accuracy
4. Test timer cancellation
5. Verify timer UI visibility states
